summary: Decent‑sounding recording that rewards the listener, highlighted by a rocking “Ship of Fools” after a slightly rusty opening.
review: Both reviewers found the show worth hearing, noting plenty of juice and a memorable performance of Ship of Fools. The first few numbers are described as a bit rusty before the band finds its stride, but no audio problems were reported, suggesting an overall solid listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews praise the musical performance and mention no recording flaws; with limited data the rating leans toward a good show on an acceptable recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss sound quality, but no complaints were made, implying a satisfactory listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Opening songs felt a little rusty, but the band quickly finds its groove and delivers an energetic set.
